titleStmt.title: SII 9.260: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 260. (A.R. No. 108 of 1904.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE MANDAPA IN FRONT OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE OF THE CHENNAKESVARA TEMPLE AT BAGALI, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and not dated. It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Jagadēkamalladēva, probably the second of that name, and mentions his feudatory, • • • Pāṇḍyadēva ruling over Noḷambavāḍi thirtytwo-thousand, the learned and warlike Mahājanas of Bāguḷi and a certain Vatsa-chamūpa. It registers the grant of six honnus to the reader of the Purāṇas and four honnus to the reciter of the Aindra hymns out of the interest of gadyāṇas 50.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
jayatyāviṣkritaṁ viṣṇōrvvārāhaṁ kṣōbhitārṇnavaṁ dakṣiṇōnnatadaṁṣṭrāgraviśrāṁtabhuvanaṁ vapuḥ . śubhōnnatalasatukīrttiśauryyasāmartthyaśālinaṁ
vatsadaṇḍādhipaṁ rakṣa vīrakēśava nityaśaḥ . śrīvīrakēśavadēvara purāṇavṛttigaṁ Ayiṁdrakkaṁ poṁge Ippaṇa vriddhiyalu
kramavāhivāgi kaḍaṁgoṭṭa gadyāṇa 50 lekkadoḷaṁ gadyāṇa 50 Adaṟa vriddhiyoḷage purāṇakke Āṟu honnaṁ kuḍuvaru Ayiṁdrakke nālku
honnaṁ koḍuvaru .
svasti śrīrjjayaścābhyudayaśca . ghanaveṁbina śaṁkhavidrumalatāsaṁkīrṇnakaśuktisaṁjanitānēkaviśuddhamauktikacayaṁ kāLines are numbered from here onwards at both ends.
catprabhābhāsajīvanasabhā kacakkramakaraprōccaṇḍaśuṇḍāḷakūrmmanikāyaṁ viḷasattaraṁgalatikōdīrṇnārṇnavaṁ raṁji
kuṁ . Arṇnavamēkhaḷeyiṁ jamadasaṁkīrṇaviḷāsadineḷeveṇnāṇmana sogayi
suguṁ . mahārājādhirāja paramēsva ṭṭāraka satyāśra
yakuḷatiḷaka cāḷu jagadēkamalladēvavijayarājya ddhipravarddhamāna
mācaṁdrārkatāraṁ salutta sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ tatpādapadmōpa
jīvi samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda puravarādhīśvara yaduvaṁśāṁbaradyu ḍāmaṇi nija
kuḷakamaḷa śrīmajjagadēkamalladēvapādā praśastisahitaṁ śrī
manmahāmaṇḍaḷēśva noḷaṁbavāḍi mūvatticchāsiramuma rājyaṁgeyyuttamire .
malema givantuṭandu vokkalu doreyādudāṭadi rva
layu manneyarani ttalaghuparākramakrama kāhu
bōlinagaggada maṇḍalikamṛgabēṁṭekāṟaṁ nilisida bhūbhṛ
dvajradaṇḍaṁ samara ddhura sēnākāḷadaṇḍaṁ drōha sa
rasivēdaṇḍanatuḷa rōhakaprasphuritōdyadbā paricchēdigaṇḍaṁ Antu .
dharageseva pāṇḍya mūvartticchāsirada paṁcaśatakanā
māṁkitadiṁ . kōgaḷiyaynū sāśvatavibhavakkāgaravenisi hāravativistāraṁ .
baḷasida nandanaṁ taṟugida baḷedoṟagirdda śāḷivanamo ḷaviḷasitamāgi
ralke kalidēvanivāsaviḷāsadinde raṁjipudu kaṇgaḷa parbbameni bage paridellinōḍuvaḍava
lliye śāstrada nālukuvēdadōdu purāṇakathāvaḷiyalli valli posadeseya pāṇḍyanā
ḍeyadoppu venalagrahāratati lārppuvē . Alli sogayi bahuśāstrapāragarvvē
davidarssa kṣaṇaramaḷayaśōvalli riṣṭāḷaṁbar . va nneṁgeyu manneyavāri diṭaṁ poga
rvvakāḷana paṁdalegoṇḍa ntuṭaṁtiradhikarśśaraṇāgatavajrapaṁjara ḷiyayvadiṁbara mahā
nī dharitriyoḷ jaḷadhiya baṁda parābhavaminnumakkumeṁdaḍe vaṁda teṟadiṁ keṟe raṁjipudaṁ
paḍiyesalīśvaraṁ berasura gaviganārī bāguḷiyoḷu nindame berasirppudu ni taṁ . pa
veḍevaṟida segaḷoḷperggeṟe ḍidire bāguḷi ḍichandaṁ sa sudhe
Antu pogaḷtegaṁ negarttega da bāguḷiyoḷu . janavina ṇḍyāvanīpāḷana reyada
nidhāna tpaḷasudhāṁśu vatsacamūpaṁ Ā vananvayakhyātiyentendoḍe .
ppakavikulaṁ doḷkanatkanakasarōja raṁjisuvaṁtuṭavaṁśavalli
tanna dhare sarbbadēvana . narapatijīya
rasu ṟidaro vanuḷidavaraḷave sarbba
vatsa na peṁpaṁ . Ā
tra negarddayvarppu
Digital edition of SII 9.260 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
